The purpose of this study is to investigate the effectiveness of mindfulness-based interventions (MBIs) in reducing stress and improving well-being.
The study will be conducted in two phases. In the first phase, we will conduct a systematic review of the literature to identify the most effective MBIs for reducing stress and improving well-being. In the second phase, we will conduct a randomized controlled trial (RCT) to test the effectiveness of the most effective MBIs in reducing stress and improving well-being.
